rationale: Replaces the prior compact `CptCountScreen` and `DashboardScreen` in `MainScreens.kt` with dedicated files. New `CptCountScreen.kt` accepts `language`, `records`, `selectedCategory`, `onCategorySelected`, renders a horizontally-scrollable `FilterChip` row over `CptCategory.entries` using `BrandBlue=Color(0xFF2498EA)` as the `selectedContainerColor`, and uses `remember(records, selectedCategory)` to flatten `records.flatMap { it.charges }`, filter by `category == selectedCategory`, group by `cptCode`, and render `LazyColumn` rows with code, description, frequency count, and summed `billedAmount` plus an empty state. New `DashboardScreen.kt` computes `FinancialMetrics(grossBilled, adjustments, insurancePaid=(billed-adj-patient).coerceAtLeast(0.0), patientDue)` from `record.totalBilledAmount`/`totalContractualAdjustmentAmount`/`totalPatientResponsibility`, draws a three-segment stacked allocation bar with `Box(.weight(...).background(color))`, and lists per-provider spending with `LinearProgressIndicator` proportional fills. `HomeScreen.kt` rewrite adds a welcome card with total billed and out-of-pocket, claims-count and billing-flags stat cards (using `EobAnalyzer.detectBillingIssues(record).count { it.severity != BillingIssueSeverity.Info }`), and an appointments timeline with an `AlertDialog`-based add-visit flow that calls the existing `onAddAppointment(date, provider, time, notes)` callback. `EobNavHost.kt` is updated to use the new named-parameter signature for `CptCountScreen`. The rewrite is consistent across all call sites and matches the PR body's stated workspace.
